title: Nanomachines
hook: Command nano-swarms through sci-fi tissue and circuit channels to repair targets while avoiding cleanup drones, heat vents, and spreading clog foam.
mechanic: Top-down channel repair action game. The player steers a nano-swarm with drag or keyboard, fires repair pulses with tap or space, fills repair target rings, clears clog foam, and manages integrity, heat, and clog pressure across escalating sectors.

dedupe.notes: dedupe_check.py reported no recognized existing mechanic class and low token overlap.
